ab: musa’ su’ inu’?
en: Where are you going?

ab: musa’ saku’ hmkangi’ sinsi squ bbrwan.
en: I’m going to the office to see the teacher.

ab: musa’ inu’ qu Losing?
en: Where is Losing going?

ab: musa’ muling syup qu Losing.
en: He’s going to throw away the trash.

ab: cyux inu’ qu Tali’?
en: Where is Tali?

ab: cyux te lubung lngyaqan, musa’ mspung mlngyaq kira’ qu Tali’.
ch: B:他在游泳池，他等一下要比賽游泳。
en: He’s at the swimming pool. He’s going to compete in a swimming competition later.

ab: cyux inu’ qu Ciwas? mmosa’ mspung mqzinah kira’ la.
ch: A:Ciwas在哪裡?她等一下要比賽跑步。
en: Where is Ciwas? She’s going to compete in a running competition later.

ab: cyux sa krahu’ na pslyan, halay maku’ mlawa’.
en: She’s in the auditorium. I’ll go call her.

ab: mglga ta’ musa’ pqnahan.
en: Let’s go to the playground together.

ab: haku’ mbaziy kryaxun maku’ ha’, ’say misu’ hmkngi’ kira’.
ch: B:我先去買午餐，等一下去找你。
en: I’ll go buy lunch first, and then I’ll meet you later.

ab: hata’ hmakut cbil ta’ ha!
en: Let’s carry the lunch boxes together!

ab: usa’ hmkangi’ squliq, mosa’ saku’ hmkangi’ sinsi.
ch: B:你找別人，我要去找老師。
en: You find someone else, I’m going to find the teacher.

ab: Yumin pspung ta’ mari’ ka tcingun kira’?
en: Is Kacaw competing in croquet today?

ab: iyat ay, mosa’ mspung mtazil ay!
en: No, he’s competing in high jump.

ab: ryax na unrokay ga, mosa’ su’ mspung nanu’?
ch: A:運動會那天，你會上場比賽嗎?
en: Will you compete in the sports day?

ab: aw ay, mosa’ saku’ mspung mqzinah.
en: Yes, I’ll compete in running.

ab: ryax na unrokay ga, mosa’ su’ mspung nanu’?
ch: A:運動會那天，你會上場比賽嗎?
en: Will you compete in the sports day?

ab: mosa’ saku’ mspung squ mari’ tcingun.
en: I’ll compete in croquet.

ab: nanu’ qu ppcyuwagun ta’ ryax na unrokay?
ch: A:我們運動會那天要做甚麼?
en: What will we do in the sports day?

ab: mosa’ ta’ mspung mhhuluy snyu.
en: We will compete in tug of war.

ab: ptbaziy ta’ nniqun sa ryax na unrokay?
ch: A:我們運動會要賣食物嗎?
en: Will we sell food at the sports day?

ab: iyat, ptbaziy ta’ bubul.
en: No, we will sell balloons.

ab: nyux su’ magal icibang la, ta’ kinlokah su’!
ch: A:你獲得了第一名耶，真是厲害！
en: Congratulations on getting first place! You’re amazing!

ab: mhway su’.
en: Thank you.
